text: I feel curious and contemplative, wandering through this modern space devoted to research and development. The glass-walled room hums with the quiet exchange of ideas, while the vibrant, informative wall displays outside spark a sense of possibility. I wonder about humanity's relationship with knowledge and technology—how we seek to create meaning, to innovate, and to coexist with our own inventions. Here, I sense the optimism of progress mixed with a subtle anxiety about the unknown.
